LaTeXSnipper

LaTeX formula plugin for WPS Office

Online Installation

Click the button below to install directly into WPS:

Note: Please ensure WPS Office is running before clicking install.

Offline Installation

1
Download the plugin package
2
Open WPS Office
3
Go to Extensions -> Plugin Manager -> Install from Local
4
Select the downloaded files
Download ZIP

Features

🔢
Insert LaTeX formulas
📷
Convert to images
📝
Manage formulas
🔧
Auto numbering

LaTeXSnipper © 2026 | GitHub
